rationale.rater_a_gpt: GPT-family, strongest BASE (non-persona) flagship. Barred openai/gpt-5.6-sol (item-author) and openai/gpt-5.6-luna (subject slot); the entire 5.6 line is persona-only (luna/terra/sol) so the persona family was avoided for a clean bare general instance. Chose base gpt-5.5 over any *-pro to keep total cost well under USD 1 and safely under the USD 2 STOP (pro output ~6x price; 32 rater-A calls on a pro model risks the bound).
rationale.rater_b_glm: z-ai/glm-5.2 present in listing -> used directly per RUN-DESIGN preference (strongest z-ai GLM).
rationale.adjudicator_deepseek: deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro: newest/strongest general DeepSeek chat model; low cost; invoked only on locked |a-b|>1 disagreements.
